_comment2: For Claude Code CLI: claude mcp add agentic-mcp -- python3 /path/to/agentic-mcp/server.py

claude_code: claude mcp add agentic-mcp -- python3 /path/to/agentic-mcp/server.py --llm-provider huggingface
openclaw: openclaw mcp add agentic-mcp -- python3 /path/to/agentic-mcp/server.py --llm-provider huggingface

_env_vars.EI_API_KEY: Edge Impulse API key (optional, for EI tools)

_example_prompts: List all Arduino boards connected via USB
Compile the Blink sketch for my Nano 33 BLE
Show me system info about this machine
Search for Python files in the current directory
